title: Windows Event Log Cleared
description: Detects clearing of the Windows Security/System event log (1102/104), a common anti-forensics action.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=1102%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=104%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 24 HOURS
